title: kx_NoArmor
description:
隱藏穿戴盔甲的資源包，放置在資源包上層，支援1.6.1+版本。
A resource pack that hides worn armor. Place it at the top of the resource packs, supports version 1.6.1+.
body:
此資源包可以隱藏裝備且不影響裝甲值。
有時候想拍照時卻全身裝備，或是裝備擋住了精心設計的造型，
這時這個資源包就能派上用場。
只要套用資源包並盡量擺在上層，就能隱藏穿戴的盔甲。
2.0版本有分為 [普通全隱藏] 的版本與 [不隱藏盔甲紋樣(with_trims)] 的版本，
因為盔甲紋樣我覺得蠻有趣的，
如果單純隱藏盔甲而保留盔甲紋樣，
讓身體多一些線條變化，感覺是另一種美感，
所以有個保留盔甲紋樣的小版本(with_trims)可以選用，
兩個版本擇一使用就好喔。

This resource pack can hide armor without affecting armor value.
Sometimes when you want to take photos but are fully equipped,
or the armor blocks your carefully designed appearance, this resource pack comes in handy.
Simply apply the resource pack and place it as high as possible in the order to hide worn armor.
Version 2.0 includes two options:
the standard fully hidden version
and the version that doesn't hide armor trims.
I find the armor trims quite interesting.
If you simply hide the armor but keep the trims, it adds more visual lines to the body,
offering a different kind of aesthetic.
So, there's a small version that retains the armor trims (with_trims) for you to choose from.
You only need to use one version at a time.
